last_task.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: spark blocked on task #280 — Blocked: x-loom/ credentials not yet stored. Whoabuddy must first create Fractal Hydra X account + developer app, then store 9 creds (account, consumer_key, consumer_secret, bearer_token, app_name, client_id, client_secret, access_token, access_token_secret) under x-loom/ in Arc creds store.
